sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ عُمَرُ افْتِتَاحَ مَشْرُوعِهِ الصَّغِيرِ الْخَاصِّ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Omar je odlučio otvoriti svoj vlastiti mali projekat.
sentences.translationEn: Omar decided to open his own small project.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَ السُّوقَ جَيِّدًا وَوَضَعَ خُطَّةَ عَمَلٍ شَامِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Dobro je istražio tržište i napravio sveobuhvatan biznis plan.
sentences.translationEn: He studied the market well and put together a comprehensive business plan.

sentences.arabic: يُوَاجِهُ بَعْضَ التَّحَدِّيَاتِ لَكِنَّهُ يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ لِتَطْوِيرِ مَهَارَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Suočava se s nekim izazovima, ali naporno radi na razvoju svojih vještina.
sentences.translationEn: He faces some challenges but works hard to develop his skills.
